历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category/Science were approximately 59590→5482→2865→3250→3888. In 2021, there was an extreme value due to a gap (59590), and from 2022 onwards, it returned to a normal range (2865–5482). In the recent 3 years (2023–2025), rankings fluctuated between 2865 and 3888, with the 2025 baseline at about 3888, a slight backward shift of about 1023 places compared to 2023. The university's enrollment plan in Shaanxi for Physics Category/Science: 56 in 2021, 56 in 2022, 59 in 2023, 59 in 2024, 60 in 2025; in 2026, the plan significantly expands to 93, an increase of 33 (about 55%) compared to 2025, notably increasing admission slots, which greatly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class comprehensive university; ranked about 13th (Top20) in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, stable in the 11–13 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities; reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative (mainly involving academic misconduct incidents), but in 2025 it was positive; Douyin popularity ranking 29th (relatively hot), short video exposure moderately high; in 2022, there was a severe gap in Shaanxi Science (admission line only 3 points above the first batch line), impacting that year's application psychology, but subsequent years have normalized; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 23 disciplines rated A- or above, including Business Administration A+, Ecology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Mathematics A, Physics A, Biology A, Basic Medicine A, Clinical Medicine A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Clinical Medicine, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in this province is about 206,500, an increase of about 34,032 (about 19.7%) compared to 2025 (172,468), intensifying competition; Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangdong (not this province), with enrollment in Shaanxi accounting for about 1.4%–1.8% (2021–2025), which is cross-provincial enrollment; Guangdong, as an economically developed region, has some regional appeal to Shaanxi examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 3888, the significant enrollment expansion of 55% in 2026 (pressure to shift ranking backward), the increase in provincial examinees by about 19.7% (intensified competition), the university's top-tier level and advantageous disciplines (supporting application popularity), and given that the expansion rate far exceeds the examinee increase rate, but with a somewhat negative reputation and a larger examinee base, after moderate correction, the predicted minimum ranking is about 5071, with a range of 4571–5571.

- Clinical Medicine (Guangzhou) (Five-Year Program).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4571–5571, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Mathematics, Electronic Information, Cyberspace Security) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program, Computer Science) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Physics, Civil Water Conservancy Dual Degree) as a safety net. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<4571), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan

Rankings have fluctuated narrowly within the 346–417 range over the past 5 years, showing overall stability. The 2025 baseline is approximately 417, the highest (most backward) in recent years. Enrollment plan for this university in Shaanxi liberal arts/history category: 20 in 2021, 20 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 17 in 2024, 17 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 20, an increase of 3 (approximately 17.6%) compared to 2025, a slight expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class comprehensive university; ranked approximately 13th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in the 11–13 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (mainly involving academic misconduct incidents), but the 2025 reputation is somewhat positive. Douyin popularity ranking is 29th (relatively hot), with medium-high short video exposure. In 2022, there were gaps in multiple provinces, but no extreme anomalies occurred in Shaanxi liberal arts. The fifth round of discipline evaluation includes 23 disciplines rated A- or above, among which liberal arts-related include Chinese Language and Literature A, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A-, Law A-, Philosophy A-, Sociology A-, Foreign Language and Literature A-, etc., highlighting strong liberal arts strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region

In 2026, the number of history category candidates in this province is approximately 88,500, an increase of about 12,859 (approximately 17%) compared to 2025 (75,641), intensifying competition. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangdong (not in this province), with a liberal arts enrollment share in Shaanxi of about 0.5%–0.8%, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Guangdong, as an economically developed region, has a certain regional appeal to Shaanxi liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 417, the slight enrollment expansion of 17.6% in 2026 (pressure to shift ranking backward), the increase of about 17% in provincial candidates (intensified competition, basically offsetting the expansion effect), the top-tier level of the university and its strong liberal arts disciplines (supporting application popularity), and other factors; the expansion and candidate increase are basically matched, requiring no additional correction. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 461, with a range of 406–516.
